name: verigate-access-control
description: VeriGate Access Control - Comprehensive QR Code-based Accreditation System for Events

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix web-dashboard install && npm --prefix verigate-pass install && npm --prefix verigate-scan install
scripts.ci:all: npm ci && npm --prefix backend ci && npm --prefix web-dashboard ci && npm --prefix verigate-pass ci && npm --prefix verigate-scan ci
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix web-dashboard run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix web-dashboard run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix web-dashboard run lint && npm --prefix verigate-pass run lint && npm --prefix verigate-scan run lint
scripts.doctor: npm --prefix verigate-pass run doctor && npm --prefix verigate-scan run doctor
scripts.type-check: npm --prefix backend run type-check && npm --prefix web-dashboard run type-check && npm --prefix verigate-pass run type-check && npm --prefix verigate-scan run type-check
scripts.validate: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build && npm run doctor

author: Aman Agnihotri
